requirement.title: Parse Plugin Dir Field
requirement.description: Scenario parser reads optional "## Plugin Dir" field and expands ${PROJECT_ROOT} to actual path.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: "## Plugin Dir" followed by "${PROJECT_ROOT}" resolves to the eval's projectRoot path. REQ-F010
"## Plugin Dir" followed by an absolute path is used as-is. REQ-F010
Missing "## Plugin Dir" results in scenario.pluginDir = undefined. REQ-F010

requirement.title: Parse Max Turns Field
requirement.description: Scenario parser reads optional "## Max Turns" field as integer.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: "## Max Turns" followed by a number sets scenario.maxTurns to that integer. REQ-F010
Missing "## Max Turns" results in scenario.maxTurns = undefined (runtime applies default logic: 10 if pluginDir set, omit flag otherwise). REQ-F010

requirement.title: Max Turns Resolution Priority
requirement.description: Max turns resolved in order: CLI flag > scenario field > auto-detect > default.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: CLI --max-turns overrides scenario ## Max Turns value. REQ-F009
Scenario ## Max Turns overrides auto-detect and default. REQ-F010
When pluginDir is set and no explicit maxTurns, default is 10. REQ-F003
When no pluginDir and no explicit maxTurns, no --max-turns flag is passed to claude CLI. REQ-N002
